title: Mushrooms Plus
body: ![Mushroom Pack Logo](https://i.imgur.com/IMsZk4K.png) --- **What's Inside**: - Adds 3D models to Red and Brown Mushrooms, as well as Warped and Crimson Fungi. - Adds 3D models to Potted variants of all mushrooms - Adds a (super) rare little mushroom friend. His name is Shroomie! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1) ![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png) ![Overworld Mushrooms](https://i.imgur.com/hLKsgYK.png) ![Crimson Fungi](https://i.imgur.com/rlMLqh2.png) ![Warped Fungi](https://i.imgur.com/ncO5ZX8.png)
